response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience as a full-stack engineer with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and has worked on various projects that demonstrate their technical skills and problem-solving abilities.
strengths: Strong experience with full-stack development and relevant technologies
Proven track record of delivering high-quality software solutions
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java compared to other technologies
Some experience is not directly related to the primary stack
